title: Motivational Monday
excerpt: Absolutely loved reading this quote from Gabrielle Bernstein. Her entire blog post and video about "having it all" resonated with me. Perhaps it will do the same for you! Hope to continue spreading more motivation for each of your Mondays…
body:
Absolutely loved reading this quote from Gabrielle Bernstein. Her entire blog post and video  about "having it all" resonated with me. Perhaps it will do the same for you!

Hope to continue spreading more motivation for each of your Mondays this year using this watercolor set from Michaels and a brush that says Royal 2 on it (can’t remember where it’s from, sorry!). I also found some alternative watercolor options – Colortopia Watercolor Set | this one | and this one. If you have a favorite quote – snarky, silly, or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
